sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# All white bars are gone. Now I need to click the blue cursor like in level 1.
# Blue cursor is at the bottom right area. Let me find it.
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 50:
        print(n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'])
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (b[0][0] + b[1][0]) // 2
        c = (b[0][1] + b[1][1]) // 2
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c}])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
